controls.verifier_policy: explicit two-stage confirm-first confirm/repair/abstain with v2.4 span-disciplined infrequent repair over unknown

hypothesis: Local Qwen3.6:35b verify-repair v2.4 improves cap-25 monthly frequency versus v2.2 direct guardrails (27.3%) by repairing infrequent over-unknown without v2.3 over-repair regressions on YTD, clusters, and qualitative unknown.
metric_caveats: This 25-record cap compares verify-repair v2.4 against direct v2.2 guardrails on matched records.
Verify-repair doubles model calls versus direct extraction; latency is not comparable to direct-only runs.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing.
Raw exact, normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, evidence support, and verifier decisions are diagnostic.
Promotion gate: monthly >= 37.5% (v2 direct cap-25 anchor) with schema >= 90% and >= 3/4 infrequent-unknown fixes.
Do not run cap-25 until the 14-record regression slice clears promotion gates.
This config targets the fixed Gan synthetic validation split and must not be described as published Gan benchmark reproduction.
